headline: Biogen seeks Darzalex rivalry in China for multiple myeloma with felzartamab deal
summary: The manufacturing of the drug will be retained by TJ Biopharma at its site in Hangzhou, which would make felzartamab China’s first domestically produced anti-CD38 immunotherapy for multiple myeloma (MM).

raw.headline: Biogen seeks Darzalex rivalry in China for multiple myeloma with felzartamab deal

headline: Biogen Q1 Earnings: Can New Launches Offset Declining MS Franchise?
summary: Biogen heads into Q1 earnings with new drugs like Skyclarys and Zurzuvae driving growth as legacy MS products face rising competitive pressure.
